title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules, derived from Anthropic founders' public statements, for deciding what products and features to build with Claude. The video frames these as decision-making principles for builders across personal projects, startups, and business applications.
